metadata.description: Collection of AI-powered plugins for Claude Code — code intelligence, voice cover generation, and more.

plugins.name: code
plugins.description: AST-based code indexing, call graph analysis, semantic search, and persistent business memory for Python projects.

plugins.name: ai-voice-cover
plugins.description: AI voice cover generator — create multiple cover versions from YouTube URLs using RVC voice models, with automatic best-output selection.
